product_or_company_name: Critical Role: The Legend of Vox Machina
candidate_summary: Critical Role's animated-special 2019 Kickstarter; most-funded film/TV Kickstarter at the time.
observed_outcome_summary: Closed 2019-04-19 with $11,385,449 from 88,887 backers against a $750,000 goal. Positive downstream outcome: Amazon Studios acquired streaming rights (Nov 2019); series premiered Jan 2022 and was renewed through multiple seasons.
raw_outcome_evidence: Wikipedia 'The Legend of Vox Machina', verbatim: 'The final total raised by the Kickstarter when it closed on April 19, 2019, was $11,385,449 with 88,887 backers.' Amazon pickup confirmed. (Operator-fetched 2026-05-31.)

action_signal_candidates.notes: 88,887 backers; $11,385,449 pledged; goal $750,000. Tier-1 buyer action. Media/creator category.

geographic_demographic_notes: Driven by Critical Role's pre-existing fanbase (highly receptive denominator).
reviewer_notes: Recommended evidence_tier=1. Adds creator/media category diversity + a clean positive downstream outcome (Amazon series). Recommended designation: TRAINING. Strong fanbase bias.
uncertainty_flags: self_selected_denominator: backers/users are self-selected; the receptive/uncertain/skeptical proportions of the FULL addressable market are NOT externally observable
buyer_numerator_only: the action signal gives the buyer/action-positive count, not a four-bucket distribution
captive_fanbase: backers are an established fan audience, not a neutral market sample
beware_mid_campaign_figures: an early Variety snapshot ($5.79M) circulates; use only the final $11,385,449
